beginner: ERC-721 makes each token unique — perfect for collectibles, art, and ownership records.
intermediate: Each ERC-721 token has a distinct tokenId with its own owner; the standard defines ownerOf, safeTransferFrom and metadata extensions.
advanced: ERC-721 relies on ERC-165 introspection and a safeTransfer receiver hook (onERC721Received) to prevent tokens being locked in non-aware contracts.
